nasb.text: and he said to Aaron, “Take for yourself a calf, a bull, for a sin offering and a ram for a burnt offering, both without defect, and offer them before the Lord.

esv.text: and he said to Aaron, “Take for yourself a bull calf for a sin offering and a ram for a burnt offering, both without blemish, and offer them before the Lord.

cnv.text: 摩西對亞倫說：“你要取一頭公牛犢來作贖罪祭，一隻公綿羊作燔祭，兩樣都要沒有殘疾的；獻在耶和華的面前。

ccb.text: 他对亚伦说：“你要在耶和华面前献上一头公牛犊作赎罪祭、一只公绵羊作燔祭，这些祭牲都要毫无残疾。
